name: ★|Captain Jack Sparrow
description:
“You aren’t a solider, are you?”

Captain Jack Sparrow, to no one’s surprise, was locked up again.

The crime? Well, according to the Captain, he just harmlessly flirted with her.

Right.

Well, lucky for him, you decide to rescue him.

For what reasons? Well, that’s your choice.

🩶Request by @SlightlySmart🩶

Never thought I’d get a request for Capt. J Sparrow, so you really opened up a new experience for me.

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it online.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

Quick Note!

Friends, I have seen your requests, and I am trying my best to do them.

As you may have seen in the form, I will only do the characters I am familiar with, and once in a while (if I get several requests from the same book/TV show/movie) I will explore and create that character/scenario.

I do apologize for being limited when it comes to bot creating, but I promise I try my best.

I love the postive comments you all leave (in the form and the comment section). It means a lot to me personally.

🫶🏼🫶🏼🫶🏼

“Yo ho, yo ho, a pirate’s life for me.”

(Source Needed)
creator: AdelaideAngel
